idea: Inline all $ref references in JSON schemas before passing to claude --json-schema. Add a function inline_schema_refs(value: &mut serde_json::Value) in src/adapters/process_backend.rs that: 1) Collects all definitions from the top-level 'definitions' key, 2) Recursively walks the schema tree, 3) Replaces any {"$ref": "#/definitions/Foo"} with the actual definition object, 4) Removes the top-level 'definitions' key. Call it in build_command() after enforce_strict_mode_schema() but before passing schema_json to --json-schema. Add tests: verify a schema with $ref gets inlined, verify nested $ref, verify schema without $ref is unchanged. This fixes issue #46 — claude model fails structured output validation when schema contains $ref under load.
